decision.summary: No new action: with only 2 hours left in the daily session, the only clean remaining expression is the already-open weekly 80k reach.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 78736.01, still close to the highs but now with open interest contracting, which is consistent with late-session exhaustion rather than a fresh expansion phase worth chasing. The account already has the active weekly 80k reach, which remains the clean structural expression of the upside continuation thesis, while the old weekly 72k dip and the daily 80k reach are both discarded_for_slot and no longer block anything. For the daily board, only 2 hours remain until expiry, and the nearest upside continuation, 80k reach, has collapsed to about 8%, which is far below the preferred band and far too late to treat as a serious same-day setup. The nearest downside dailies also remain too weakly priced to justify a new bearish entry without a clear reversal already underway. On the weekly board, the next upside strike, 82k reach, trades around 30%, below the preferred range and would still amount to chasing farther extension in the zone Beecthor treats as probable exhaustion and shorting territory. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. The correct action is to hold the live weekly 80k thesis and avoid opening any fresh late-session position.
